name: Salmon for Supper
recipeIngredient: 1 Large russet potato, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash salmon and pat dry.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter in vermouth; stir in orange peel, lemon juice, and vegetable seasoning.
3. Place salmon in a baking dish. Brush each side of fish with the butter mixture.
4. Lay potato slices on top of the fish. Sprinkle garlic, onion, and parsley over the potatoes.
5. Cover the baking dish tightly with foil.
6. Grill over barbecue coals for 10-15 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily.
Or, bake covered at 325°F until the fish flakes easily.
